case_title: TYLER JOHN TORONTO VS. THE HARTFORD FINANCIAL SERVICES GROUP ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF TYLER TORONTO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. THE COURT APPOINTS RONALD P. SCHNEIDER, SBN 62669, AS ARBITRATOR. BRAD BOSTICK, SBN 111235, SHALL BE THE ALTERNATE. MOVING PARTY'S OTHER CHOICE, FRED HIRSCHFIELD, IS INACTIVE WITH THE STATE BAR. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters: UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Set For Uninsured Motorist Osc On Dec-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. Matter is not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TYLER TORONTO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

The unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. The court appoints Ronald P. Schneider, SBN 62669, as arbitrator. Brad Bostick, SBN 111235, shall be the alternate. Moving party's other choice, Fred Hirschfield, is inactive with the State Bar.

Prposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
